content: Better Auth has a built-in deviceAuthorization plugin (since at least 2024). Import: import { deviceAuthorization } from 'better-auth/plugins'. Config: betterAuth({ plugins: [deviceAuthorization({ verificationUri: '/device' })] }). Creates a deviceCode table: id, deviceCode, userCode, userId (optional), clientId (optional), scope, status ('pending'/'approved'/'denied'), expiresAt, lastPolledAt, pollingInterval. Endpoints added: POST /device/code (request codes), POST /device/token (poll for access token), GET /device (verify page), POST /device/approve (user approves), POST /device/deny (user denies). Client plugins: deviceAuthorizationClient() from 'better-auth/client/plugins'. Access token integrates with Bearer plugin. This is RFC 8628 compliant — no need to build custom implementation.
